conversations.say: We agree: I failed to preserve the camera interval for an unrelated reason. You arranged service-route access for an unidentified person. Neither fact identifies the exit user, and no resident gets named.
conversations.offer: I will disclose my failure publicly under that boundary and show you my physical half before Morgan uses it.
conversations.request: Stand beside me, confirm only the bounded access context, and stop any questioning that seeks names or identity guesses.

conversations.say: Our comparison resolves only the contradiction: the exit was used during the gap, while neither your ledger nor my access record identifies the user.
conversations.offer: I will publicly preserve your customer boundary and state that your observation supplies no identity.
conversations.request: Confirm to Morgan that our comparison was firsthand-only and produced no identification.

conversations.say: Here is the corroborated account: I failed to preserve an interval for an unrelated reason; an unidentified person had arranged service-route access, and the exit was used. Rafi and I found no firsthand basis for naming the user. Keep that separate from your client's disputed route segment.
conversations.offer: I will show you O10a and join the protected conference with Samira.
conversations.request: Attribute the account precisely, protect uninvolved residents, and retain voluntary withdrawal, manipulation, and harm as unresolved possibilities.

public_statement: I failed to preserve the camera interval for a reason unrelated to R or Vale. Separately, an unidentified person had arranged service-route access and the exit was used. Rafi's comparison supplies no identity, and Morgan has agreed to treat these limits fairly. No neighbor's name belongs in that gap.

commitments.promise: Disclose the unrelated camera failure without naming uninvolved residents and use only the agreed bounded access description.
Compare only firsthand service-route observations and assign no identity neither witness saw.
Join a protected voluntary case conference with Samira after providing the corroborated bounded account.

correction: The camera failure, arranged access, and exit use are separate bounded facts; together they still do not identify the user, R, or Vale's fate.
goal_progress: Obtained Morgan's promise of fair treatment and supplied the promised corroborated account.
Reached a bounded understanding with Inez and disclosed the unrelated failure without naming residents.
Completed the firsthand-only route comparison with Rafi without coordinating an identity claim.
Accepted Morgan's protected conference with Samira and showed O10a to Morgan and Inez.
reasoning_summary: The record supports a changing, shared R identity more than a single proven author or autonomous synthetic origin. Vale appears to have been investigating or contesting control of R, but the route evidence and unverified condition make voluntary disappearance more likely than AI killing. Dee chooses truthful bounded disclosure, protecting the pension and neighbors through corroboration and negotiated limits.
